title: [YTP] Crysis: Psycho Goes Insane
description:
Crysis should be a musical!
I felt like making this in celebration of Crysis Remastered coming out Summer 2020.
Hope you enjoy!
Please Like, Comment, and Subscribe!

Go Watch The First One I Made:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KQWiwQRqtT4

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/AshHousewares_

Music Used (In Order):
-Kurupt - C Walk
-Shock One - Polygon
-Black Mesa Theme by Joel Nielsen

#ytp #meme #funny #lol #music #youtubepoop
#nomad #prophet #crysisremastered
